name: Suite — Paraphrase Robustness (Dr.Spider-style seed)
description: Seed paraphrase-robustness suite. Flat Scenarios[] shape matching every other suite in this folder, so the live CopilotAssessmentHandler reads it natively. Scenarios sharing a ClusterId express the SAME intent in different phrasings — the paraphrase runner groups by ClusterId at report-build time. Perturbation labels are diagnostic only; the parser MUST NOT use them as a closed alphabet (see Pipeline/Stages/Decomposed/README.md for the principle). Modelled on Dr.Spider (arXiv 2301.08881). Future paraphrases SHOULD be produced by the OfflineParaphraseGenerator, not hand-written here.

Scenarios.Question: show me users with their role and Id and Name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.Id, u.UserName, r.Name AS RoleName FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id LEFT JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId
Scenarios._note: User's reported failure case — see PR-001-bracket variants below.

Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.Id, u.UserName, r.Name AS RoleName FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id LEFT JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId

Scenarios.Question: ticket count by status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Count DESC
